description: Argon2id (version 0x13) known-answer vector for the Zenon wallet KDF parameters: password (32 x 0x01), salt (16 x 0x02), memory 65536 KiB, 1 pass, 4 lanes, 32-byte tag, no secret or associated data (the wallet KDF uses neither). The tag was produced by the RustCrypto argon2 implementation this crate depends on. All byte strings are hex-encoded.
